name: A Man Who Defies the World of BL
original_name: 絶対BLになる世界vs絶対BLになりたくない男
overview: Mob tries to avoid being the main character in a BL world, but as love finds him, he must choose between staying in the background or embracing romance.

trailers.title: A Man Who Defies the World of BL | Final Trailer | If u can't fight the urge, so join the BL world!
